# ConvoCore

> ConvoCore is a modular Unity dialogue framework for authoring branching conversations in YAML and playing them back in any genre of game. Write dialogue in plain YAML files -- no proprietary formats, no node graphs. Character logic, expressions, branching, localization, and save state are all configured in the Unity editor. ConvoCore compiles YAML into runtime-ready ScriptableObjects automatically.

## Getting Started

- [Installation](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/getting-started/installation): Install ConvoCore via the Unity Package Manager
- [Quick Start](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/getting-started/quick-start): Create your first conversation from scratch -- YAML file, ConversationData asset, ConvoCore component, and test output
- [Project Structure](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/getting-started/project-structure): Where to place YAML files, assets, and scripts in your project
- [Troubleshooting](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/getting-started/troubleshooting): Common mistakes and fixes for setup and runtime issues

## Core Systems

- [ConvoCore Component](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/core-systems/convocore-component): The main MonoBehaviour -- PlayConversation, StopConversation, events (StartedConversation, CompletedConversation, OnLineStarted, OnChoiceMade), and the IConvoStartContextProvider pattern
- [Conversation Data](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/core-systems/conversation-data): The ScriptableObject that holds compiled dialogue, participants, and YAML references -- ConversationGuid, Import YAML from Key, Sync from Source
- [Conversation Container](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/core-systems/conversation-container): Groups multiple conversations into playlists or selector modes with weighting, aliases, and branching
- [Input Modes](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/core-systems/input-modes): SingleConversationInput vs ContainerInput -- how ConvoCore resolves which conversation to play
- [Conversation State](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/core-systems/conversation-state): Inactive, Active, Paused, Completed state machine -- transitions, CanReverseOneLine, event subscription safety
- [Player Choices](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/core-systems/player-choices): Branching dialogue via player choice lines -- ChoiceOption fields, PushReturnPoint, AllowGoBack

## YAML Reference

- [YAML Overview](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/yaml-reference/yaml-overview): Why YAML, hot-reload workflow, and how the YAML-to-ScriptableObject pipeline works
- [YAML Format](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/yaml-reference/yaml-format): Full field reference -- ConversationName, Participants, Dialogue entries, LocalizedDialogue, LineID, LineContinuation
- [Line Continuation](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/yaml-reference/line-continuation): Continue, EndConversation, ContainerBranch, and PlayerChoice modes
- [YAML Loading](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/yaml-reference/yaml-loading): Four load sources -- AssignedTextAsset, Persistent, Addressables, Resources -- and the load priority order

## Characters

- [Character Profiles](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/characters/character-profiles): CharacterID, CharacterName, IsPlayerCharacter, and the Representations list
- [Character Representations](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/characters/character-representations): SpriteCharacterRepresentationData, PrefabCharacterRepresentationData, and custom CharacterRepresentationBase subclasses
- [Expressions](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/characters/expressions): Named emotion assets (ConvoCoreCharacterExpression) -- how expressions map to sprites, animations, or custom logic via BaseExpressionAction

## UI

- [UI Foundation](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/ui/ui-foundation): The ConvoCoreUIFoundation abstract base class -- UpdateDialogueUI, WaitForUserInput, PresentChoices, HideDialogue
- [Sample UI](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/ui/sample-ui): The ready-made dialogue UI prefab included in the Samples package -- how to import and use it as a starting point
- [Building a Custom UI](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/ui/building-a-ui): Step-by-step guide to implementing a ConvoCoreUIFoundation subclass
- [Dialogue History](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/ui/dialogue-history): ConvoCoreDialogueHistoryUI -- displaying a scrollable log of past dialogue lines

## Dialogue Actions

- [Actions Overview](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/dialogue-actions/actions-overview): What dialogue actions are -- before/after line hooks, RunOnlyOncePerConversation, reversal behavior, and execution order
- [Built-in Actions](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/dialogue-actions/built-in-actions): Enable/Disable GameObject, Fade Sprite, Instantiate Prefab, Modify Transform, Play Audio, Action Group
- [Custom Actions](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/dialogue-actions/custom-actions): Extending BaseDialogueLineAction -- ExecuteLineAction coroutine, ExecuteOnReversedLineAction, CreateAssetMenu, instance vs asset state, BaseExpressionAction

## Localization

- [Localization Overview](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/localization/localization-overview): ConvoCoreLanguageManager -- CurrentLanguage, SetLanguage, OnLanguageChanged, and the fallback chain
- [Adding Languages](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/localization/adding-languages): Step-by-step -- SupportedLanguages, YAML keys, runtime switching

## Save System

- [Save System Overview](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/save-system/save-system-overview): Architecture -- ConvoCoreSaveManager, ConvoCoreConversationSaveManager, ConvoVariableStore -- and the GameSnapshot data model
- [Save Manager](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/save-system/save-manager): ConvoCoreSaveManager asset -- Initialize, Save, Load, Delete, settings storage, OnSaveCompleted event
- [Conversation Save Manager](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/save-system/conversation-save-manager): Per-conversation component -- auto-commit flags, auto-restore flags, IConvoStartContextProvider integration
- [Variable Store](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/save-system/variable-store): ConvoVariableStore -- Global/Conversation/Session scopes, Set/Get API, OnVariableChanged event, live diff inspector
- [Save Providers](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/save-system/save-providers): IConvoSaveProvider -- JSON and YAML built-in providers, custom provider skeleton for cloud saves
- [Snapshot Migration](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/save-system/snapshot-migration): ConvoCoreSnapshotMigrator -- SchemaVersion, registering migration steps

## Extending ConvoCore

- [Extending ConvoCore](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/extending-convocore): All extension points in one place -- custom actions, custom representations, custom UI, custom save providers, expression actions

## Settings

- [ConvoCore Settings](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/settings/convocore-settings): Global settings ScriptableObject -- SourceOrder, SupportedLanguages, Addressables toggle, VerboseLogs, SaveKeyPrefix

## C# API Reference

The full Doxygen-generated C# API is at:
- [API Root](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/api/): Entry point for the generated API documentation
- [All Classes (annotated)](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/api/annotated.html): Annotated class list with one-line descriptions for every class, struct, and interface
- [Class Index (A-Z)](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/api/classes.html): Alphabetical index of all public types
- [Namespace Members](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/api/namespacemembers.html): All members grouped by namespace
- [File List](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/api/files.html): All source files with links to their documentation
- [Full Sitemap](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/api/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable XML list of every API page

### Key Runtime Classes

- [ConvoCore](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/api/classWolfstagInteractive_1_1ConvoCore_1_1ConvoCore.html): Main MonoBehaviour conversation runner -- PlayConversation, StopConversation, ReverseOneLine, CurrentDialogueState, all events
- [ConvoCoreConversationData](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/api/classWolfstagInteractive_1_1ConvoCore_1_1ConvoCoreConversationData.html): ScriptableObject holding compiled dialogue lines, participants, and YAML references -- ConversationGuid, DialogueLines, ResolveCharacterProfile
- [ConvoCoreUIFoundation](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/api/classWolfstagInteractive_1_1ConvoCore_1_1ConvoCoreUIFoundation.html): Abstract UI base class -- override UpdateDialogueUI, WaitForUserInput, PresentChoices, HideDialogue
- [BaseDialogueLineAction](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/api/classWolfstagInteractive_1_1ConvoCore_1_1BaseDialogueLineAction.html): Base class for custom dialogue actions -- ExecuteLineAction (coroutine), ExecuteOnReversedLineAction, RunOnlyOncePerConversation
- [CharacterRepresentationBase](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/api/classWolfstagInteractive_1_1ConvoCore_1_1CharacterRepresentationBase.html): Abstract base for character visual representations -- ApplyExpression, GetExpressionMappingByGuid
- [BaseExpressionAction](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/api/classWolfstagInteractive_1_1ConvoCore_1_1BaseExpressionAction.html): Base for per-expression synchronous actions -- ExecuteAction(ExpressionActionContext)
- [ConvoCoreLanguageManager](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/api/classWolfstagInteractive_1_1ConvoCore_1_1ConvoCoreLanguageManager.html): Singleton for runtime language management -- CurrentLanguage, SetLanguage, OnLanguageChanged
- [ConversationContainer](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/api/classWolfstagInteractive_1_1ConvoCore_1_1ConversationContainer.html): ScriptableObject grouping multiple conversations -- Playlist and Selector modes, GetByGuid, IndexOf
- [ConvoCoreSettings](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/api/classWolfstagInteractive_1_1ConvoCore_1_1ConvoCoreSettings.html): Global settings ScriptableObject -- SourceOrder, SupportedLanguages, AddressablesEnabled, VerboseLogs
- [ConvoCoreCharacterExpression](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/api/classWolfstagInteractive_1_1ConvoCore_1_1ConvoCoreCharacterExpression.html): Named expression asset with stable GUID -- maps an emotion name to visual data in a representation

### Key Interfaces

- [IConvoCoreRunner](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/api/interfaceWolfstagInteractive_1_1ConvoCore_1_1IConvoCoreRunner.html): Contract implemented by ConvoCore -- used for loose coupling in actions and UI
- [IConvoInput](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/api/interfaceWolfstagInteractive_1_1ConvoCore_1_1IConvoInput.html): Resolves which conversation to play -- implemented by SingleConversationInput and ContainerInput
- [IConvoStartContextProvider](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/api/interfaceWolfstagInteractive_1_1ConvoCore_1_1IConvoStartContextProvider.html): Supplies start line index and visited lines before a conversation begins -- used by the save system

### Save System Classes

- [ConvoCoreSaveManager](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/api/classWolfstagInteractive_1_1ConvoCore_1_1SaveSystem_1_1ConvoCoreSaveManager.html): Save system entry point ScriptableObject -- Initialize, Save, Load, Delete, OnSaveCompleted, OnLoadCompleted
- [ConvoCoreConversationSaveManager](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/api/classWolfstagInteractive_1_1ConvoCore_1_1SaveSystem_1_1ConvoCoreConversationSaveManager.html): Per-conversation MonoBehaviour -- auto-commit, auto-restore, TryAutoRestore, CommitSnapshot
- [ConvoVariableStore](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/api/classWolfstagInteractive_1_1ConvoCore_1_1SaveSystem_1_1ConvoVariableStore.html): Scoped variable storage -- Global, Conversation, Session scopes; Set/Get for String/Int/Float/Bool; OnVariableChanged
- [IConvoSaveProvider](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/api/interfaceWolfstagInteractive_1_1ConvoCore_1_1SaveSystem_1_1IConvoSaveProvider.html): Interface for custom save backends -- Load, Save, Delete, SlotExists, GetAllSlots
- [ConvoCoreSnapshotMigrator](https://docs.wolfstaginteractive.com/convocore/api/classWolfstagInteractive_1_1ConvoCore_1_1SaveSystem_1_1ConvoCoreSnapshotMigrator.html): Schema migration utility -- Register migration steps, auto-called on Load
